word: G1237 - διαδέχομαι - diadéchomai - dee-ad-ekh'-om-ahee - Come after

sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to receive through another, to receive in succession, to receive in turn, to succeed to
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G1223 and G1209; to receive in turn, that is, (figuratively) succeed to: - come after.
